extension_name.description: Display name in browser stores and the extension manager.

extension_short_name.description: Short name shown when the full name does not fit.

extension_description.message: Auto-save and recover text from web forms. Privacy-first, no servers, no telemetry.
extension_description.description: Listed in the extension manager and the store.

command_open_recovery.message: Open the recovery dialog on the current page

context_menu_recover.description: Right-click menu item shown on editable fields.

popup_empty.message: No saved drafts for this site yet. Start typing in any text field — Typio NG will autosave after a short pause.

popup_restore_failed.message: Could not restore — the field is no longer on the page. Try the recovery dialog.

options_title.message: Typio Chrome Form Recovery NG — Options

options_blocklist_help.message: One hostname per line. Use a leading dot to match all subdomains (e.g. .bank.com).

recovery_empty.message: No drafts saved for this site yet.
